title: Messi 'doing well', could play World Cup warmups

title: SoFi workers authorize strike days before WCup
description: Service workers at SoFi Stadium have voted to authorize a potential strike just days before the venue is scheduled to host the United States opening World Cup match against Paraguay on June 12.
